deliverable1_et_curve.note: the honest fusion c_eff=0.8903 yields E[T]=5.5176, a 9.71% drop from the linear E[T]=6.1112 at c_eff=0.9213. E[T] is strictly increasing in c_eff, so coverage shortfall maps monotonically to a lower E[T] lever.

restore_geom_sensitivity.model: cov_W = 1 - rho^(W-1), rho from cov4_fusion (cov(W=1)=0 convention)
restore_geom_sensitivity.note: point-estimate only; not load-bearing. Even this saturating model needs W~5.37 (M=43) > knee 32, so the lower bound (W>=5) and the estimate agree: restoration crosses the cliff. A larger W only worsens the supra-cliff case (W=7 -> M=50 would also cross the M=49 second cliff).

restore_lower_bound.argument: coverage is monotone in W and cov4_fusion=0.5166 < cov_needed=0.6532, so restoring c_eff=0.9213 needs W>=5; the smallest such tree (W=5) already presents M=36 > knee 32 -> the M=33 cliff is unavoidable for ANY restoration.

tile_map.formula: M = W*K + 1 ; thread_m_blocks = ceil(M/16) ; knee_Mstar=32 (cliff @ M=33)

deliverable3_ab_decision.note: (A) sub-cliff lever 5.5176 vs (B) supra-cliff lever 5.2241: the +16.98% cliff penalty exceeds the +10.76% E[T] gain, so STAY-SUB-CLIFF wins. They would tie at mu_tie=1.1076; the real cliff mu=1.16981 is past it. Compliant worst: A=444.99 > B=421.32.

operating_point_B_supracliff.desc: W>=5, M>=36, E[T] restored to 6.11, step /mu (supra-cliff)

deliverable4_honest_envelope.cap_subtlety_note: deliverable scales the BANKED corners (central is cap-bound at the lambda ceiling) by the E[T] lever ratio, per the PR's lever convention. A strict re-price holding the lambda ceiling FIXED would leave central cap-bound near 521.0 (still >500), so the WORST corner (445.0) is the binding compliant-500 test either way -- and it is below 500.

deliverable5_verdict.handoff_to_fern_335: feeds fern #335's joint compliant-500 AND-gate DEMAND axis: refine its binary [c_eff >= 0.9213] coverage gate into the CONTINUOUS consequence honest_envelope = fern_envelope x E[T](c_eff_honest)/E[T](0.9213). At c_eff=0.8903 the demand axis is RED (worst 444.99 < 500) before any private-tax/identity term is applied.
deliverable5_verdict.second_failure_mode_note: this is a SECOND, independent failure mode: the binary identity/acceptance bar already fails (0.8903 < 0.9213), but here the SAME shortfall ALSO collapses the compliant-500 envelope on the E[T] LEVER axis -- the demand miss does not need the identity bar to kill compliant-500.
deliverable5_verdict.why: the honest fusion c_eff=0.8903 (lawine #330) drops E[T] to 5.5176; restoring E[T]=6.11 needs W>=5 (M>=36 > knee 32) so the cliff (mu=1.16981) inflates the step, and the +16.98% cliff penalty exceeds the +10.76% E[T] gain -> STAY-SUB-CLIFF wins at E[T]=5.5176. Scaling fern #325's banked envelope by 0.9029 gives central 470.35 / worst 444.99 -- BOTH below 500.

caveats: DERIVED, not measured: no EAGLE-3 fusion checkpoint runs here; this prices the E[T] and tile consequences the measured coverages (linear 0.6532, fusion 0.8903 c_eff) imply under stark #331's tile map. NOT a running EagleProposer.

the exact restoring width W is model-dependent; the verdict rests only on the model-free lower bound W>=5 (M>=36 > knee 32), which any monotone coverage curve satisfies. The geometric estimate (W~5.4, M~43) is a labeled sensitivity that only strengthens the supra-cliff loss.

deliverable 4 scales the banked corners by the E[T] lever ratio per the PR. The central corner is cap-bound at the lambda ceiling; a strict cap-fixed re-price leaves central >500 but the WORST corner is below 500 either way (the binding test).

0 TPS / re-pricing property: depends only on the chain law, integer node counts, the measured tile boundary, and fern #325's banked corners -- not tensor values. NOT a launch / build / served-file change / HF Job / submission.
imports.provenance: fern #325 (banked compliant-500 envelope: lambda ceiling 520.95, central 586.08, worst 492.87, both @E[T]=6.11) x stark #331 b48rmwjq (M=W*K+1 tile map, knee 32, mu=1.16981 from measured M=32->33 step, chain law E[T]=1+sum c^d, a1=0.7731, cov4=0.6532, a1_required_611=0.9213) x lawine #330 hfrscdai (honest fusion top-4 c_eff=0.8903) x fern #34 gua9x68j (native a1~0.7714/0.7731). All run-ids in wandb-applied-ai-team/gemma-challenge-senpai.
